title: callitriche brachycarpa
intro: Callitriche brachycarpa, also known as water starwort, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of fever. Callitriche brachycarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
